name: Investigate VinFast ECU/VCU reuse + E/E architecture
notes: KEY QUESTION: can the donor VinFast VCU/master ECU be reused for the H2 fuel-cell hybrid retrofit? Determine: (1) which OEM ECUs can be RETAINED (traction motor inverter, battery BMS, ABS/ESC, cluster) vs which must be REPLACED (energy-manager/VCU); (2) is the OEM CAN bus accessible / can we add a gateway; (3) integration path for new supervisory VCU/EMS + Fuel Cell Control Unit + DC/DC + H2 safety controller; (4) homologation/warranty impact of not touching OEM firmware. Sources: VinFast E/E architecture docs, teardown, or OEM engineering contact. Deliver findings into the report 'Control & E/E Architecture' section.
